description: Get full details for one event: title, venue, date and time, price range, description, and image gallery. Provide event_id (UUID) or slug from search_events results.

description.name: search_hotels_near_event
description.description: Find hotels within walking or short-transit distance of an event venue. If no check_in/check_out provided, defaults to one night before through one night after the event (2-night stay). Returns nightly price, total cost, distance, transport mode (walk vs rideshare), and travel time to venue.

description.name: search_experiences
description.description: Find activities, tours, attractions, food experiences, and nightlife in a city (sourced from Hotelbeds). If no date range provided, defaults to next 7 days. Returns activity name, price, duration, image, and whether free cancellation is offered.

description.name: build_event_link
description.description: Generate a deep link to the Event Escapes event detail page. The user lands on a page where they can review ticket categories, see hotels near the venue (auto-loaded), and complete booking themselves. Optionally pass hotel_id to pin a recommended hotel at the top of the hotels-near-venue list. This

description.name: build_package_link
description.description: Generate a deep link to a curated Event Escapes PACKAGE detail page (/packages/{slug}). Packages are hand-curated bundles of event tickets + hotel + experiences with savings vs DIY booking. Use this AFTER calling search_packages to surface a specific package to the user.
